inputs.label: Shakes
inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of shakes to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the number of shakes to convert.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the result.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucu yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor (ns/shake)
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion: 1 shake = 10 nanoseconds. Change if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion: 1 shake = 10 nanoseconds. Change if needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm: 1 shake = 10 nanosaniye. Gerekirse değiştirin.

inputs.label: Output Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiply the resulting nanoseconds by this factor, e.g., 1e3 for picoseconds, 1e-3 for microseconds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiply the resulting nanoseconds by this factor, e.g., 1e3 for picoseconds, 1e-3 for microseconds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortaya çıkan nanosaniyeyi bu faktörle çarpın, örn. pikosaniye için 1e3, mikrosaniye için 1e-3.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
